# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

Prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/application",
    "description": "Application with automated setup and asset compilation",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.0",
        "ext-json": "*",
        "ext-curl": "*"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('.env')) { copy('.env.example', '.env'); echo 'Environment file created\\n'; }\"",
            "@php scripts/verify-checksums.php",
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php --verify-signature",
            "@php scripts/setup-database.php",
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php",
            "bash scripts/setup-permissions.sh",
            "bash scripts/create-directories.sh",
            "@php scripts/generate-app-key.php",
            "@php scripts/cache-config.php"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@php scripts/verify-checksums.php",
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php --verify-signature --update",
            "@php scripts/migrate-database.php",
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php --production",
            "bash scripts/setup-permissions.sh",
            "@php scripts/clear-cache.php",
            "@php scripts/cache-config.php",
            "@php scripts/optimize-autoloader.php"
        ],
        "setup": [
            "@composer install",
            "@post-install-cmd"
        ],
        "verify-integrity": [
            "@php scripts/verify-checksums.php",
            "@php scripts/verify-dependencies.php"
        ],
        "compile": [
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php --production"
        ],
        "test": [
            "phpunit"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "setup": "Complete application setup including dependencies and configuration",
        "verify-integrity": "Verify integrity of downloaded assets and dependencies",
        "compile": "Compile and optimize application assets",
        "test": "Run application test suite"
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/package-versions-deprecated": true
        },
        "secure-http": true,
        "disable-tls": false,
        "github-protocols": ["https"],
        "platform-check": true
    },
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true,
    "repositories": [
        {
            "type": "composer",
            "url": "https://repo.packagist.org",
            "only": ["*/*"]
        }
    ]
}
